GSP PRE 2026. SUBMITTED Apr 20, 2026. First time applying to General Support (previously applied to PEP). Unrestricted funding. Preliminary round — if invited, Main Round deadline Aug 13, 2026. Requested $5,000. 15 concerts projected (Sep 2026 – Aug 2027). 12 American composers. All-American Concert Apr 2027.
improvements: Switched from PEP (Project Support) to GSP (General Support) after 2025 denial. Stronger season with 12 American composers vs previous single-concert proposals.
